profile.name: Alex Morgan
profile.title: Business Analyst • Software Engineer
profile.tagline: Bridging business strategy with technical execution.
profile.summary: Versatile professional with 6+ years of experience translating complex business requirements into scalable digital products. Comfortable across the full delivery lifecycle — from stakeholder workshops and process modeling to API design and front-end implementation. I help teams ship the right thing, faster.

bullets: Led requirements discovery for a $4M enterprise CRM migration impacting 800+ users across 3 regions.
Built executive dashboards that reduced weekly reporting effort from 12 hours to under 2 hours.
Coached a team of 4 junior analysts on stakeholder management and process modeling best practices.
Designed and shipped an internal tooling platform used daily by 200+ operations staff.
Reduced p95 API latency by 38% by introducing caching, pagination, and query optimization.
Owned end-to-end delivery: RFC, implementation, observability, and on-call rotation.
Authored BRD/FRD documents for a digital onboarding flow that lifted conversion by 17%.
Partnered with compliance and engineering to roll out a new KYC workflow in 4 markets.
Automated weekly KPI rollups, eliminating ~10 hours of manual work per cycle.
Supported client workshops and translated findings into actionable product briefs.

education.details: Coursework in data warehousing, distributed systems, and product management. Capstone on decision-support dashboards for mid-market finance teams.
Minor in Computer Science. Concentration in Operations & Information Management.

projects.title: Insight Hub
projects.description: Self-serve analytics portal for non-technical stakeholders. Drag-and-drop dashboards, scheduled email reports, and role-based access control.

projects.title: OpsFlow
projects.description: Lightweight workflow automation tool for operations teams. Visual rule builder, audit log, and integrations with Slack and Jira.

projects.title: KYC Modernization
projects.description: End-to-end redesign of a manual KYC process. New digital intake, automated document checks, and a case-management console for reviewers.
highlights: Reduced onboarding time from 5 days to under 1 day

projects.title: Career Compass
projects.description: Open-source resume and portfolio analyzer that scores readability, structure, and ATS-friendliness.

certifications.name: IIBA Entry Certificate in Business Analysis (ECBA)

footer.note: Built with the Professional Corporate Template — modular, reusable, and ready for the template marketplace.
